name: Pricing discipline
rationale: Standardized quote governance and segment pricing improve gross margin quality.

name: Workflow digitization
rationale: Replace manual handoffs with tracked workflows to reduce cycle-time leakage.

name: Sales process redesign
rationale: Pipeline stages, account plans, and conversion metrics improve repeatability.

name: Margin expansion program
rationale: Mix management, scrap control, and procurement cadence can unlock EBITDA quality.

name: Equipment/utilization visibility
rationale: Visibility into run rates and downtime supports throughput planning.

name: Reporting and KPI discipline
rationale: Weekly operating rhythm and leading indicators improve intervention speed.
